history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H. The map shows a clear path: move right to column D, then turn down and go straight to row 8, then turn right and go to column H. The first step is to move forward to column C, which is a safe floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column C facing right. The cell directly in front (row 02, column D) is empty floor. This is a safe step toward my goal. After moving forward, I will be on column D, which is a clear vertical path to row 8. Then I can turn down and proceed.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row02 column D facing east (`>`). The goal is at row08 column H. A clear path is to go south along column D, which is free of lava all the way to row08, then turn east to reach the goal. To change orientation from east to south, I need to turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column D facing down. The goal is at row 8, column H. There is a clear path straight down along column D to row 8, then right to H. So I should move forward (down) one cell to (3, D).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column D, facing down. The goal is at row 08, column H. The path directly below me is clear: cells (04,D), (05,D), (06,D), (07,D), (08,D) are all empty. From (08,D), I can go right to (08,H) which is the goal, and columns E, F, G are also empty. Since I am already facing down, I can move forward to start descending.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row4 column D facing down. The cell directly ahead is (5,D) which is floor. I need to move down towards row8. So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column D, facing down. The goal is at row 8, column H. There is a clear path downward along column D (rows 6, 7, 8 are all safe). After reaching row 8, I will turn right and move east to column H. My next action should be to move forward to row 6, column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column D, facing down (v). The goal is at row 08, column H. The cell directly below (row 07, column D) is floor (.), so I can move forward. I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7 column D facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 8 column D) is empty and safe. I will move forward to get closer to the goal at (8,H). After this, I will need to turn right to face east and then move right four times to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>FRENTE</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column D, facing down (v). The goal (O) is at row 08, column H, which is to the right (east). To face right, I need to turn counter-clockwise (anti-horario) from down. After turning, I can move forward multiple steps through safe cells ('.') to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row08 column D facing right. The goal is at row08 column H, directly to the east. The cells to the east (E, F, G, H) are all safe (floor or goal). So I can move forward to cell E.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column E, facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H. The cells directly ahead (col F and col G) are floors, and then col H is the goal. So I can move forward safely.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, two steps ahead. The cell directly in front (row 08, column G) is safe floor, and the next cell (row 08, column H) is the goal. I should move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column G, facing right. The goal is immediately to the right at column H. I can move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
